## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check backend/ tests/ scripts/` is clean
- [ ] `python -m pytest tests/ -q` passes
- [ ] New/changed behavior is covered by tests
- [ ] Safety invariants untouched (confirmation gate, path allowlist,
      never-overwrite, audit log) — or the change strengthens them
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed (README / .env.example)
